message:
fix(clippy): resolve remaining CI lint errors

- Exclude optimize-params (fast_cmaes submodule) from clippy
- Allow collapsible_match at workspace level (match guards with side effects)
- Remove trailing commas in format macros (bench_quick, explainability_screen)
- Allow dead_code on HostPressureCollector fields used only on Linux
- Merge Event::Paste into catch-all match arm

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@ jobs:
         run: cargo check -p frankensearch-fsfs --no-default-features
 
       - name: cargo clippy
-        run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --exclude fastcma -- -D warnings
+        run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --exclude optimize-params -- -D warnings
 
       - name: cargo fmt --check
         run: cargo fmt --check

@@ -138,8 +138,9 @@ unsafe_code = "deny"
 pedantic = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }
 nursery = { level = "warn", priority = -1 }
 # ── Nightly-unstable pedantic/nursery lints that churn CI ──
-# Nightly clippy adds new collapsible_if patterns (let-chains) that churn CI.
+# Nightly clippy adds new collapsible_if/match patterns (let-chains) that churn CI.
 collapsible_if = "allow"
+collapsible_match = "allow"
 # Nightly const-eval expansion causes false positives on match-based fns.
 missing_const_for_fn = "allow"
 # Function length is a design judgement; enforcing in CI is too noisy.
